title: HC Wainwright Issues Pessimistic Forecast for SoundHound AI (NASDAQ:SOUN) Stock Price
description: SoundHound AI (NASDAQ:SOUN – Get Free Report) had its price objective dropped by analysts at HC Wainwright from $26.00 to $20.00 in a note issued to investors on Monday,Benzinga reports. The brokerage presently has a “buy” rating on the stock. HC Wainwright’s target price suggests a potential upside of 135.02% from the company’s previous close. [...]

title: Core Scientific to Sell 2,500 Bitcoin as Company Pivots Toward AI
description: Core Scientific expects to sell most of its 2,500 BTC holdings in Q1 2026 to strengthen liquidity and fund AI-focused data center expansion. The move reflects a broader shift among public miners pivoting toward high-performance computing. CORZ Plans Q1 Bitcoin Exit for AI Push Core Scientific (NASDAQ: CORZ) is preparing to part with most of [...]

title: I tested ChatGPT-5.2 vs Nano Banana 2 with 5 AI image prompts — and there's a clear winner
description: I tested ChatGPT-5.2 against Nano Banana 2 against each other to see which chatbot can generate the best-looking AI images based on my descriptive prompts
